title: HUIANER 2 Stems Artificial Thistle Spray Eryngium Flowers Artificial Real Touch Eryngium Artificial Sea Holly Flowers for Wedding Bridal Bouquet Wreath Table Centerpiece Outdoor Decor (Purple)
features: YOU WILL GET: 2 stems artificial eryngium flowers, each stems have 2 branches and 10 flowers (4 bigger flower heads and 6 smaller flower heads).The branches can be bent. When opening the package, you can straighten or bend the stems and shape them into the desired angle, suitable for most vases.
FULLY AND PLUMP: The slightly serrated leaves surround the oval flowers, forming a natural radial umbrella, making the overall temperament of the bouquet more fluffy and full.

MATERIAL/SIZE: Artificial Eryngium flowers are made of high-quality silk, and the stems are made of plastic with an iron wire inside. Bigger flower heads size: 4cm/1.57'', 2cm/0.78”, total length : 68cm/26.7''

WIDE USAGE: Artificial Eryngium Flowers can be widely applied to decorate tables, DIY cascading bouquets, wedding bouquets, centerpieces, table flowers, home decorations, bride showers, outdoor parties, anniversaries, romantic dinners, etc. You can also vary their length to match your other accessories
WARM NOTICE: Do not expose it under the sun for a long time to avoid fading. Artificial flowers are plastic and silk materials, please stay away from candlesticks
description: Product Description HUIANER 2 Stems Artificial Thistle Spray Eryngium Flowers for Bouquet Wreath Table Centerpiece Outdoor Decor -Please notice the exact item size and permit the color difference due to the monitor's brightness and contrast settings. -Artificial eryngium flowers are reusable. Do not expose it under the sun for a long time to avoid fading. -Artificial eryngium flowers are flammable materials, please stay away from candlesticks, candles. Feature Package Including: 2 stems artificial eryngium flowers, each stems have 2 branches and 10 flowers Size:Bigger flower heads: 4cm/1.57'', smaller flowers head: 2cm/0.78”, total length : 68cm/26.7'' Material: High-quality silk+plastic+wire. Wide Application Artificial eryngium flowers look beautiful, eye-catching and vivid.
